allow: PowerShell($cid = [System.Convert]::ToUInt64\("7a0e3c1ff72a5e5c", 16\); "CID: $cid"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.google.com/maps/place/The+Sweet+Bar/@45.5398906,-122.3913255,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x5495bd2201c4f7b1:0x7a0e3c1ff72a5e5c!8m2!3d45.5398906!4d-122.3913255!16s%2Fg%2F11ys5vsb6b" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $r.Content | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "C:\\Users\\Legion\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Legion-Desktop-The-sweet-bar-website\\f1557968-9366-4db2-a890-cea0e16339f1\\scratchpad\\gmaps.html"; "saved, length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "fetch failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
